message:
Refine filter component styling for consistency and polish

Update CategoryFilter and TagFilter with design improvements that
align with the overall design system refresh:

Visual refinements:
- Replace scale hover effect with subtle color transitions for a
  more professional feel (transition-colors duration-150 ease-out)
- Use explicit zinc color palette instead of generic border-input
  and bg-background tokens for better light/dark mode control
- Add ring-offset-2 to focus-visible states for better visibility
- Remove hash prefix from tag labels for cleaner appearance

Typography and spacing:
- Reduce font-weight from semibold to medium for softer appearance
- Increase horizontal padding (px-3 -> px-4) for better touch targets
- Use smaller count text (text-[11px]) with conditional coloring:
  indigo-200 when selected, zinc-400 when unselected
- Remove parentheses around counts for minimal design

Dark mode improvements:
- Explicit dark:border-zinc-800, dark:bg-zinc-900 tokens
- Improved hover states: hover:bg-zinc-50 / dark:hover:bg-zinc-800
- Better contrast for selected state shadow (shadow-indigo-500/25)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
